all.critique:
Here is the critique:

1. The analysis correctly covers the purpose and responsibilities of the two major functions (__init__ and update_schedule). However, it does not mention that it would be best practice to inherit from Python’s built‐in abstract base class (using abc.ABC and the @abstractmethod decorator on update_schedule). Not doing so might allow accidental instantiation of the base class. This omission is of medium severity because it affects the enforceability of the intended design.
